ranked_movies.title: The Lobster

ranked_movies.title: The Act of Killing
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned across multiple posts as a profoundly shocking and unsettling documentary that challenges viewers' perceptions of morality and historical truth.

ranked_movies.title: Irreversible

ranked_movies.title: Requiem for a Dream
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as the benchmark for traumatic movie experiences that cause genuine psychological distress while maintaining artistic merit and thematic depth.

ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a logical follow-up to The Lobster, noted for its unsettling atmosphere and psychological horror from the same director.
